---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What user problem does this solve?

## Proposed Change

Describe the behavior you want.

## Scope

Explain whether this is:

- correctness/reliability
- docs/UX
- release/install
- new feature

## Notes

Call out any tradeoffs, compatibility concerns, or alternatives.
